name: climbx-cowork
description: ClimbX companion for Claude Cowork: turn niche outliers into voice-true X posts, schedule and track them, all backed by the ClimbX API.

CLIMBX_API_KEY.title: ClimbX API key
CLIMBX_API_KEY.description: Create one in the ClimbX app under Settings > API (shown once). Stored in the OS keychain. Optional if you instead place the key in ~/.climbx/api_key.
